reference: My eosinophil levels go up and down; they do not stabilize. I was prescribed to take oral steroids and have been using them for almost one year. My red bump allergy comes on and off. How can this stabilize other than steroids? I appreciate your help. Are there any foods that I need to avoid?
text: My Eosinophil levels go up and down; they do not stabilize. I was prescribed to take oral steroids and have been using them for 1 year. My Red Bumb allergy is on and off. How can this stabilize other than steroids? I appreciate your help. Are there any foods that I need to avoid?
